steps.title: Identify the goal requirement
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize a similarity”—the correct choice must highlight what the two paintings share, not what makes them different.

steps.title: Find the choice that highlights shared characteristics
steps.content: C uses both huge and provides matching measurements (149 × 255 inches and 132 × 264 inches) to underscore the shared characteristic of massive scale. The other three all emphasize differences rather than similarities. That matches choice C — C is correct.
